verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God sent His son They called Him Jesus He came to love Heal and forgive He bled and died To buy my pardon An empty grave Is there to prove My Savior lives

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And because He lives I can face tomorrow Because He lives All fear is gone Because I know (I know) He holds the future And life is worth the living Just because He lives

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And then one day I'll cross the river And I'll fight life's final war with pain And then as death gives way to victory I'll see the lights of glory And I'll know He reigns
